englishDefinitions: To want this job very badly.
A dramatic, non-literal way to say that many people would be extremely eager to have a particular job.
persianTranslation: برای این شغل هر کاری می‌کند
آرزوی داشتن این کار را دارد
examples: A lot of young designers would kill for this job.
You should be grateful; many people would kill for this job.
I would have killed for this job when I first graduated.
